title: Selected to play at HWCH 2017
bodyHtml:
Looking forward to playing at the Hard Working Class Heroes Festival coming up in September!
The festival takes place over 5 venues around Dublin city centre. We'll be in The Underground on Westland Row with billmates, Katie Laffan, The Ocelots, Jealous of the Birds and Hvmmingbyrd .
excerpt: Looking forward to playing at the Hard Working Class Heroes Festival coming up…
